MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-25-2012 IN 206, PLAINTIFFS MARY LEE COOPER AND HENDERSON BOLDEN'S MOTION FOR PREFERENCE AND TRIAL SETTING. JACQUELINE RAVENSCROFT APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFFS. MATTHEW KRACHT APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS. THE COURT MADE A PERSONAL DISCLOSURE ON JOHN STEWART BUT NO OBEJCTIONS WERE MADE. AFTER ARGUMENT, THE COURT DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR PREFERENCE. DEFENDANTS' EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS WERE WITHDRAWN. WRITTEN ORDER PENDING. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
